headline: 'You're expected to perform, but no one wants to know how you do it': Cocaine, the toxic fuel of young professionals
description: Cocaine at work (1/3). Among young professionals, the illegal and highly addictive drug is used in a relentless pursuit of performance, often shrouded in taboo and without questioning of working conditions.

'No region is safe from climate change: Brittany will not be a climate refuge'
description: Confusing a region's geographic exposure with its vulnerability to climate change can create a false sense of security and increase the unpreparedness of local authorities and residents, warn analysts Clément Jeanneau and Antoine Poincaré.

headline: England defeat Norway 2-1 in extra time, sliding into World Cup semis
description: England will face Argentina or Switzerland on Wednesday for the chance to reach a first World Cup final in 60 years.

headline: How live screenings of Paris Fashion Week are making fashion more accessible
description: Organized by influencer Lyas, free live screenings of fashion shows on big screens toured France during Paris Men's Fashion Week. Several hundred people gathered in Marseille for the opening night.

headline: Tiago Rodrigues, director of the Avignon Festival: 'Thanks to Europe, thanks to democracy, how lucky I have been!'
description: 'I wouldn't be where I am today if...' In this series, Le Monde interviews a personality about a decisive moment in their life. The director of the Avignon Festival discusses the indelible mark that the Portuguese dictatorship left on his family history.

description: In California, the rise of artificial intelligence no longer generates the unanimous enthusiasm it once did. Anxiety is mounting, especially among students and engineers, as jobs have been cut and democratic risks have grown more threatening.

headline: How Ukraine is turning Crimea, the Russians' Riviera, into a battlefield
description: The annexed Ukrainian peninsula, which Vladimir Putin sees as his crowning jewel, has descended into chaos as Kyiv ramps up attacks on the territory. Shocked tourists and residents express their distress as shortages worsen.

description: Each time a new heatwave hits, the question of air conditioning and its environmental impacts crops up in the public debate. Here are the key points to help you understand what is at stake.
